item.title: NathanKlineInstitute/OEvent
item.description: Neural oscillation event detection and analysis

item.title: advien/reborn-medtech-project
item.description: Modular safety-first control architecture for a human-in-the-loop active elbow orthosis with EMG, IMU, simulation, and bounded ML. Researching how assistive robotic systems should determine appropriate assistance under uncertain sensing con

item.title: visserle/pain-measurement
item.description: Objective Measurement of Fluctuating Pain

item.title: nargesyaghoubi/NeuroSignal
item.description: EEG signal processing with Python, featuring filtering, visualization, artifact correction, feature extraction, and techniques for real-time and time–frequency analysis in BCI applications.

item.title: wwhenxuan/PySDKit
item.description: A Python library for signal decomposition algorithms

item.title: fish0976/NeuroFlow
item.description: Full-stack real-time EEG analytics and device-ready BCI research platform

item.title: parvanehyaghoubi/NeuroWave
item.description: Applied EEG signal processing with Python. Including filtering, visualization, artifact removal, and real-time analysis techniques.

item.title: rainbowpuffpuff/ez_think2earn
item.description: ZKML (EZKL) proofs over fNIRS BCI models — mental arithmetic vs baseline (ZuThailand EZKL Prize). Colab in ~5 min.

item.title: enkhbold470/dota2-companion
item.description: NeuroFocus — Dota 2 NeuroSync: EEG-powered focus coaching + AI Dota 2 companion (GSI overlay, gpt-5.4 coach, OpenDota stats)

item.title: mne-tools/mne-cpp
item.description: MNE-CPP: The C++ framework for real-time functional brain imaging.

item.title: spm/spm-docs
item.description: SPM Documentation

item.title: nbara/python-meegkit
item.description: 🔧🧠 MEEGkit: MEG & EEG processing toolkit in Python

item.title: AxonOS-BCI/axonos-community-radar
item.description: AxonOS Radar — a living, auto-updated map of the open brain-computer-interface field. An AxonOS community project.

item.title: fcbg-platforms/pycartool
item.description: A simple open source Python package for I/O between Cartool and Python

item.title: scouter-project/scouter
item.description: Scouter is an open source APM (Application Performance Management) tool.

item.title: pieeg-club/EEGwithRaspberryPI
item.description: Not supported. Measure 8 EEG channels with Shield PiEEG and RaspberryPi in C library

item.title: fooof-tools/fooof
item.description: Parameterizing neural power spectra into periodic & aperiodic components.

item.title: analyticalmonk/awesome-neuroscience
item.description: A curated list of awesome neuroscience libraries, software and any content related to the domain.

item.title: PerlinWarp/pyomyo
item.description: PyoMyo - Python Opensource Myo armband library

item.title: wzpan/wukong-robot
item.description: 🤖 wukong-robot 是一个简单、灵活、优雅的中文语音对话机器人/智能音箱项目，支持ChatGPT多轮对话能力，还可能是首个支持脑机交互的开源智能音箱项目。

item.title: mims-harvard/UniTS
item.description: A unified multi-task time series model.

item.title: TBC-TJU/MetaBCI
item.description: MetaBCI: China’s first open-source platform for non-invasive brain computer interface. The project of MetaBCI is led by Prof. Minpeng Xu from Tianjin University, China.

item.title: pieeg-club/ironbci
item.description: Wearable (BLE) Brain-Computer Interface, ADS1299 and STM32 with SDK for mobile application

item.title: vlawhern/arl-eegmodels
item.description: This is the Army Research Laboratory (ARL) EEGModels Project: A Collection of Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) models for EEG signal classification, using Keras and Tensorflow

item.title: Yiming-S/DA4BCI
item.description: DA4BCI provides a suite of domain adaptation methods specifically designed for EEG-based brain-computer interface (BCI) applications.
